degrees.notes: The authoritative Economics program section labels the degree AA-T and prints 20-23 major units. A separate transfer-degree summary in the addendum says Economics AS-T, apparently a summary-list typo; the detailed program page and degrees index both say AA-T.

notes: Only the general Economics AA-T appears in the detailed official 2025-2026 program section.
